titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Ayyub Ibn Nuh
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Ayyub Ibn Nuh

segments: ه عن أيّوب بن نوح فقد رويته عن أبي، و محمّد بن الحسن رضي اللّه عنهما- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، و الحميريّ جميعا عن أيّوب بن نوح‌.
arabic.text: ه عن أيّوب بن نوح فقد رويته عن أبي، و محمّد بن الحسن رضي اللّه عنهما- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، و الحميريّ جميعا عن أيّوب بن نوح‌.

segments: Everything in this book that is narrated from Ayyub ibn Nuh has been transmitted by me from my father and from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them both - from Sa'd ibn Abdullah and Al-Himyari together, from Ayyub ibn Nuh.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Everything in this book that is narrated from Ayyub ibn Nuh has been transmitted by me from my father and from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them both - from Sa'd ibn Abdullah and Al-Himyari together, from Ayyub ibn Nuh.
